examples: The body and frame are a hybrid monocoque structure.
The monocoque frame is made of hardwood and is exceptionally light weight.
"Monocoque" represents another approach to the fabrication of a skin-like membrane.
The advantages of carbon-fibre were exploited by the AMG engineers in the design of the monocoque.
Up close, the hollow monocoque wooden frame has a lustrous two-tone sheen that begs to be touched.
